---
title: "Analyzing Baby Names and Flights"
author: "Alec Rogers"
format: html
execute:
    echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(duckdb)
library(dbplyr)
```

```{r}
con_names <- DBI::dbConnect(
  duckdb::duckdb(),
  dbdir = "data/nameby_year.duckdb"
)
```

```{r}
#| cache: true

dbplyr_names <- tbl(con_names, "babynames")

x <- dbplyr_names |>
    filter(name %like% "Z%", year > 2000, n >= 10) |>
    mutate(length_class = if_else(str_length(name) <= 5, "Short", "Long")) |> 
    summarize(total = sum(n), .by = c(year, length_class)) |> 
    arrange(year) |>
    collect()
```


```{r}
x |>
  mutate(prop = total / sum(total), .by = year) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = prop, fill = length_class)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Short" = "#4CAF50", "Long" = "#FF9800"),
    labels = c(
      "Short" = "Short (≤5 characters)",
      "Long"  = "Long (>5 characters)"
    ),
    name = "Name Length"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Z Names by Length Over Time",
    subtitle = "Short names have become more popular",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Proportion of Names", 
    caption = "Source: babynames dataset"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r}
con_air <- dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(), "data/nycflights13.duckdb")

 dbplyr_fly <- tbl(con_air, "flights")

 departure_table <- dbplyr_fly |>
    select(dep_time, arr_time, sched_dep_time, dep_delay, tailnum) |>
    collect() |>
    mutate(tail_number = parse_number(tailnum)) |>
    filter(!is.na(dep_time))

departure_table |>
  summarise(
    dep_time_na = sum(is.na(dep_time)),
    arr_time_na = sum(is.na(arr_time))
  )
```

```{r}
departure_table |>
    select(tailnum) |>
    collect() |>
    filter(grepl("^N1", tailnum)) |>
    distinct(tailnum)
```

```{r}
#| cache: true

x <- departure_table |>
  mutate(
    dep_hour = dep_time %/% 100,
    dep_minute = dep_time %% 100,
    sched_hour = sched_dep_time %/% 100,
    sched_minute = sched_dep_time %% 100,
    true_dep_delay = pmax(dep_delay, 0)
  ) |>
    count(sched_hour, dep_hour, wt = true_dep_delay, name = "total_delay")
```

normal scale coloring
```{r}
ggplot(x, aes(x = sched_hour, y = dep_hour, fill = total_delay)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", name = "Total Delay (min)") +
  labs(
    title = "Flight Departure Delays by Scheduled vs Actual Hour",
    subtitle = "Most delays occur in the afternoon and evening",
    x = "Scheduled Departure Hour",
    y = "Actual Departure Hour",
    caption = "Source: flights dataset"
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```
log scale coloring

```{r}
ggplot(x, aes(x = sched_hour, y = dep_hour, fill = total_delay)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10", option = "C", name = "Total Delay (log)") +
  labs(
    title = "Flight Departure Delays by Scheduled vs Actual Hour",
    subtitle = "Most delays occur in the afternoon and evening",
    x = "Scheduled Departure Hour",
    y = "Actual Departure Hour",
    caption = "Source: flights dataset"
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```
